title: Neuro-Collaboration: The Psychology of Human-AI Trading
author: Creative-Macaroon843
selftext:
Most traders think AI will replace them.

I think the real danger is something else:

The human brain was never designed to process AI-level information flow.

Automation bias.  
Emotional overload.  
False certainty.  
Ghost signals.

Modern trading is becoming a psychological battle between human emotion and machine intelligence.

I made a deep-dive video about the neuroscience behind AI trading psychology.

“Your Brain Was Never Designed For AI Trading”

Would love to hear how AI tools have affected your own trading mindset.
